name: Caddies Sports Club
address: 601 Vann Dr unit b, Jackson, TN 38305
about: Caddies Sports Club is a hybrid venue combining a sports bar and grill with indoor golf simulators. The establishment features four golf bays equipped with large projection screens, offering a year-round golfing experience regardless of weather conditions. The venue provides multiple bay options ranging from basic to premier setups, with varying screen sizes and pricing to accommodate different preferences. In addition to golf, it hosts sports viewing events and offers a full menu with food and drinks, making it suitable for casual rounds, social gatherings, and special occasions.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of bay options with different screen sizes and multi-sport capabilities
Year-round indoor golf unaffected by weather conditions
Clean, modern facility with attention to decor and ambiance
Combines golf with social dining and event experiences
Technology on the golf simulator is excellent and suitable for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen menu including pizza, with food described as 'off-the-chain' and top-notch
Good beer, wine, and bourbon selection with drink specials

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator technology with large projection screens (reportedly over 200 inches)

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, golf clubs are available for rent at $15 per bag if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar menu.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playtime varies depending on the bay and number of players, but typical rounds take 1-2 hours for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Caddies Sports Club is kid-friendly and offers a family-oriented atmosphere suitable for children.
